title: Clear One Size Fits One
description: Get making, get curious, and explore the science behind asthma, eczema and allergies! Join us for a hands-on workshop where families can explore children’s health research through playful, imaginative activities. Designed for families with children aged 0–14, the space invites young learners and their grown-ups to step into the role of the expert, discovering allergic conditions in fun and accessible ways. You’ll get to make your own puppet patient as you move through a series of learning stations, picking up ideas about allergy symptoms, triggers and all the different things that shape how someone experiences their condition. No two puppets are the same. Neither are children. Together, we’ll explore why health journeys differ and why care needs to adapt to these differences too. Brought to you by a team of researchers, doctors and artists, this is a welcoming space to learn, imagine and connect. Whether you live with these conditions or are simply curious, come get stuck in.
